name: latent arc questions promote one and retire stale candidates

source.purpose: Latent questions are code-selected, bounded to top candidates, and retired after repeated eligible non-use.

arcPlan.title: The Defector

scenarioShape.premise: A witness turns every ally into a risk.
scenarioShape.whyThisRun: Protection pressure gives the late turn weight.

arcPlan.arcQuestion: Who gets protected when trust becomes expensive?

latentArcQuestions.question: Why did the defector run now?
latentArcQuestions.whyItMatters: The answer could change who deserves protection.
latentArcQuestions.answerImpactAxis: whose obligation and danger the crew re-reads

latentArcQuestions.question: Who benefits if the defector disappears?
latentArcQuestions.whyItMatters: The hunter's motive changes the price of shelter.
latentArcQuestions.answerImpactAxis: which faction's culpability and power become legible

latentArcQuestions.question: What name is missing from the route chit?
latentArcQuestions.whyItMatters: The missing name could point to obligation.
latentArcQuestions.answerImpactAxis: whose duty the route paperwork re-reads
